name: Vast Influence
description: Broadcasts frequency points to all Netrolume allies (additive with their own Hertz Beats). Starts at 1 at battle start, reaches 2 at tick 15, +1 per counter trigger (hard cap: 5 total). Engine needs: broadcastSecondaryResource effect to push controller secondaryResource to Netrolume allies; onCounterTrigger event for the counter-based increments.
